title: BCHADPlan
description: Generation plan produced from a BCHADSpec. Defines the DAG of stages to execute, their dependencies, model assignments, cost estimates, and approval gates.

pattern.description: Generation pattern used to build this plan.

projected_cost.description: Total projected LLM cost for this plan in USD, including expected retries.

stages.description: Ordered list of pipeline stages in dependency order.

estimated_total_files.description: Sum of estimated_files across all stages.

human_approval_gates.description: Stage IDs that require human approval before execution.

security_review.description: When true, this plan includes stages with sensitive fields or compliance requirements that trigger security review.

PlanStage.title: PlanStage
PlanStage.description: A single stage in the generation DAG.

depends_on.description: Stage IDs that must complete before this stage can start.

human_approval.description: When true, this stage requires explicit human approval before execution begins.

model.description: Claude model identifier to use for this stage.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this stage will generate.

estimated_files.description: Estimated number of files this stage will create or modify.

estimated_cost.description: Projected LLM cost for this stage in USD.

codebase_refs.description: File paths in the target repository that were retrieved as context examples for this stage.
